ddl.value:
("amount" is null and "currency" is null)
        or ("amount" > 0 and "currency" = 'MNT')
ddl.name: payment_event_amount_currency_check

ddl.value:
("purpose" = 'subscription' and "plan" in ('basic', 'pro', 'max'))
        or ("purpose" = 'credit' and "plan" is null)
ddl.name: payment_invoice_plan_check
